/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkeswebview.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeswebview.so CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/page_footer_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/nav_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/url_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/request_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/reply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/page_header_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/request_dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/redirect_reply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/rest_api_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/access_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/rest_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/file_reply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/error_reply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/page_reply.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeswebview.dir/user_verifier.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -L/usr/lib64 -lmicrohttpd /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so -L/usr/lib64 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0
